diagnosis: Haeduri Chicken City appears to have no meaningful website presence, which means search and referral traffic has nowhere strong to land. A simple, credible restaurant site would likely improve trust and enquiry conversion. Give the business a clearer first impression and a cleaner path to action. The biggest leak is usually unclear positioning and a weak next step.
siteBrief: Haeduri Chicken City is a restaurant in Brisbane City. Lead with Korean chicken presented around one clear local advantage: 同样是高优先级 Highlight Korean chicken, casual dining, takeaway. Keep the tone warm, editorial, inviting. The main CTA should be Get in touch. One design choice that should stand out is editorial photography.
coldMessage: Hey Haeduri, I looked at Haeduri Chicken City in Brisbane City. 同样是高优先级 Noticed there is no dedicated website experience for your restaurant in Brisbane City, so I mocked up what a clearer first impression could look like. Happy to send the mockup if you want to see it.
followUps: Quick follow-up: the clearest gap I noticed is hero clarity. I can send over the mockup if it would help.
One more thought: nearby competitors usually do a better job showing CTA path. I already mocked up a tighter version if you want to compare it.
subjectLines: Built something for Haeduri Chicken City
Quick mockup for Haeduri Chicken City
Saw your listing and made this for Haeduri Chicken City
